title: Multi‑brand Gift Card
description: What are the features, purchase options, and merchant coverage of a French multi‑brand gift card (e.g., CADO or UpCadhoc)?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about a versatile gift card that can be used across many retailers in France. Relevant documents should describe multi‑brand gift cards such as CADO or UpCadhoc, covering how to buy them (online, physical, digital), how to register and check balances, the size and type of the partner network, and any benefits for individual or professional users. Documents that focus on single‑store or brand‑specific gift cards (e.g., Decathlon, Bonobo) are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tagine Recipe
description: What is a complete recipe for preparing a lamb tagine with vegetables?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, step‑by‑step lamb tagine recipe that emphasizes the inclusion of vegetables (e.g., carrots, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes) along with traditional Moroccan spices and cooking instructions.
